# Description

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] refactor / perf
- [ ] docs
- [ ] build / ci / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `cargo test -p dither_core` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` and `cargo clippy --all-targets` are clean
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense
